sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from "react"; const Settings = () => { // Local state to handle UI toggles for individual preference controls const [preferences, setPreferences] = useState({ marketWatchChange: true, stickyOrderWindow: false, orderConfirmations: true, emailAlerts: false, darkMode: false, }); const handleToggle = (key) => { setPreferences((prev) => ({ ...prev, [key]: !prev[key], })); }; return (
Settings

Customize your workspace interface parameters, execution triggers, and security alerts.

{/* Left Segment Box: Interface Preferences */}
Platform Settings

Adjust standard visibility filters across your layout panels.

Marketwatch Change % Display absolute price variations against previous close numbers.
handleToggle("marketWatchChange")} />
Dark Theme Switch workspace layout color pallets over to low-light mode styles.
handleToggle("darkMode")} />
{/* Right Segment Box: Order Execution Mechanics */}
Trading & Orders

Configure instant confirmations and modal window anchor behaviors.

Sticky Order Window Keep the buy/sell floating entry panel open post execution.
handleToggle("stickyOrderWindow")} />
Order Confirmations Show safety verification dialog warnings before placing market orders.
handleToggle("orderConfirmations")} />
); }; export default Settings;
